title: Dense Brazilian Bananas Curry
description: A fermented, gooey, low-carb-friendly dish that layers roasted bananas with aromatic spices in a rich coconut sauce.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat and add the coconut oil until it melts.
Sprinkle the cumin seeds into the oil and sauté until they pop.
Add the ground coriander, turmeric, garam masala, and chili flakes and cook for one minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Stir in the fermented banana puree, then add the sliced bananas and reduce heat.
Cover the skillet and let the curry cook for ten minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt to taste and let it thicken for an additional two minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in the chopped cilantro.
Serve the dense curry hot, spooning it into bowls.
Enjoy this adventurous, fermented banana curry as a low-carb dinner delight.
